title: botrychium simplex
intro: Botrychium simplex, also known as the least lady fern or small rattlesnake fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Botrychium, characterized by its unique, compound fronds and distinctive rachis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Botrychium simplex include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the skin.
